nasb.text: But he himself passed on ahead of them and bowed down to the ground seven times, until he came near to his brother.

esv.text: He himself went on before them, bowing himself to the ground seven times, until he came near to his brother.

cnv.text: 他自己卻走在他們前面，七次俯伏在地，直到走近他哥哥跟前。

ccb.text: 他自己则走在他们前面，接连俯伏下拜七次，直到他哥哥跟前。

csbs.text: 而他自己在他们前面先过去，七次俯伏于地，直到临近他哥哥。
